title: athyrium kuratae
intro: Athyrium kuratae, also known as the Kurata's lady fern, is a species of fern native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the rhizome and leaves of the Kurata's lady fern are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
